title: Sousou no Frieren Paintings
description: Adds new Minecraft paintings featuring characters and scenes from Sousou no Frieren.
body:
This mod adds a collection of new Minecraft paintings featuring characters and scenes from Sousou no Frieren.

![overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d848a3b501596ada9e25b2c8e8f74a10894ce8f4.jpeg)

You can place the paintings in the same way as vanilla paintings.
This mod does not replace any existing paintings and is compatible with other painting mods.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks!

fan creation: not officially associated with the original creators
